pkgmetadata.longdescription: This plugin is obsolete. setuptools_scm 7.0.0 supports Git archives by itself.Migration guide---------------Change the contents of the .git_archival.txt file in the root directory of your repository from ref-names FormatDto node FormatH node-date FormatcI describe-name Format(describetagstrue) ref-names FormatDRemove setuptools_scm_git_archive from your projects dependencies (e.g. thesetup_requires list in your setup.py file).
